messages.author: Gnome
messages.text: Hey all, going to Tokyo in August, seen that they have an unlicensed band 920-925mhz, do we have any recommended settings for Japan?
messages.content_html: Hey all, going to Tokyo in August, seen that they have an unlicensed band 920-925mhz, do we have any recommended settings for Japan?

messages.author: Tokyo1991
messages.text: Japan is quiet when it comes to meshcore/Meshtastic because the protocol doesn’t fit in with Japanese regulatory requirements. 1. Listen before tx (not implemented) 2. limited to 13dBm (your responsibility) 3. 920.6–923.4 MHz in 200kHz steps So basically, welcome to nothing.
messages.content_html: Japan is quiet when it comes to meshcore/Meshtastic because the protocol doesn’t fit in with Japanese regulatory requirements. 1. Listen before tx (not implemented) 2. limited to 13dBm (your responsibility) 3. 920.6–923.4 MHz in 200kHz steps So basically, welcome to nothing.

messages.reply_html:
Tokyo1991
Japan is quiet when it comes to meshcore/Meshtastic because the protocol doesn’t fit in with Japanese regulatory requirements. 1. Listen before tx (not implemented) 2. limited to 13dBm (your responsibility) 3. 920.6–923.4 MHz in 200kHz steps So basically, welcome to nothing.

messages.author: Jiro
messages.text: We've started discussing MeshCore settings for Japan. Feel free to join us — your opinion matters! https://discord.gg/hjsbVrwcdQ

messages.author: Jiro
messages.text: I copied a Japanese setting proposal as a comment at GitHub issue. Please feel free to add all your opinions. https://github.com/meshcore-dev/MeshCore/issues/460#issuecomment-4080531481 (edited)
